ats_utilities.config_io.ini.object2ini module¶

Module

object2ini.py

Info

Defines class Object2Ini with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an API for writing configuration to an INI file.

class ats_utilities.config_io.ini.object2ini.Object2Ini(config_file: str | None, checker: IATSChecker | None = None, reporter: IATSReporter | None = None, file_checker: IFileCheck | None = None, verbose: bool = False)[source]¶

Bases: IWrite

Defines class Object2Ini with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an API for writing configuration to an INI file. Conversion of Python object to INI content.

It defines:

attributes:
_EXT - File extension of the configuration file.
_verbose - Enable/Disable verbose option.
_file_path - Configuration file path.
methods:
__init__ - Initials Object2Ini constructor.
write_configuration - Writes configuration to an INI file.
ERRORS¶

alias of ErrorChecker

__EXT: str = 'ini'¶
__MODE: str = 'w'¶
__checker: IATSChecker¶
__file_checker: IFileCheck¶
__file_path: str¶
__reporter: IATSReporter¶
__verbose: bool¶
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
write_configuration(config: IINIProcessor | None, verbose: bool = False) → bool[source]¶

Writes configuration to a INI file.

Parameters:

  • config (IINIProcessor) – Configuration object | None

  • verbose (<bool>) – enable/disable verbose option

Returns:

True (configuration written to file) | False

Return type:

<bool>

Exception:

ATSTypeError
